headings.usage: Main headlines, Hero text, Section titles

subheadings.usage: Card titles, Feature highlights, Price tags

buttons.primary: bg-[#D900FF] text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-[#E033FF] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(217,0,255,0.6)] transition-all duration-300 transform hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#00F0FF] text-[#00F0FF] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-[#00F0FF] hover:text-black hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(0,240,255,0.4)] transition-all duration-300

cards.glass: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 hover:border-[#D900FF]/50 transition-all duration-500 group overflow-hidden relative
cards.neon_border: relative p-[1px] bg-gradient-to-r from-[#D900FF] to-[#00F0FF] rounded-2xl overflow-hidden

navbar.style: fixed top-4 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-[95%] max-w-5xl bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 rounded-full z-50 px-8 py-4 flex justify-between items-center

visual_enhancers.gradients: Use radial gradients for background spots: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, rgba(112, 0, 255, 0.15), transparent 70%)

hero.alt: Party bus interior with neon lights and people dancing

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INITIALIZATION: Ensure Tailwind is configured with the custom colors and fonts defined above.
2. DARK MODE: Force dark mode. Do not implement a light mode toggle. The brand is strictly nightlife.
3. COMPONENTS: Use Shadcn UI for complex interactions (Forms, Dialogs, Datepickers) but heavily customize them to remove the 'default Vercel look'. Apply the 'glass' and 'neon_border' styles.
4. LAYOUT: Do not use simple rows. Use the 'Tetris Grid' for the bus showcase. Overlap elements slightly to create depth.
5. IMAGES: Use the provided Unsplash URLs. Do not use placeholders.
6. ANIMATION: Use Framer Motion for entrance animations. Fade up with a slight scale effect. Hover states must be snappy.
7. NAVIGATION: Implement a sticky glassmorphism navbar. It should shrink slightly on scroll.
8. FORMS: The contact form must use EmailJS. Style inputs with transparent backgrounds and bottom borders only (Material/Cyberpunk style).
9. ROUTING: Ensure React Router is set up for all pages: Home, Events, Buses, BusDetail, Prices, Booking, Cities, About, Contact, Blog.
10. MOBILE: Ensure all text is legible on mobile. Stack the Tetris grid into a single column but keep the visual hierarchy.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures and noise overlays separate good from extraordinary.
